title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at EaseMyTrip

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at EaseMyTrip
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, EaseMyTrip in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
